summary: This is an extremely brief post where Joel Spolsky draws attention to a new search box feature added to his blog's sidebar. He credits a reader named Kishore for suggesting the idea. The post is essentially a changelog announcement with no substantive discussion or analysis.
key_points: A search box was added to the blog's left sidebar
The feature was suggested by a reader named Kishore
Joel credited community input for driving site improvements
money_quotes: Did you notice the cool new search box on the left?
key_insight: A minor site update announcement with no substantive content to analyze.
